Solar Security · Garden · Lantern· CE & RoHS Certified· Cast Aluminium · 304 SS· OEM / ODM Programmes· IP65 · IP66· Colombia · Ecuador · South Africa · Australia· 200 Pcs Trial Order· Solar Security · Garden · Lantern· CE & RoHS Certified· Cast Aluminium · 304 SS· OEM / ODM Programmes· IP65 · IP66· Colombia · Ecuador · South Africa · Australia· 200 Pcs Trial Order·

"The grid is failing markets across Africa, Latin America, and Oceania.
Solar lighting isn't an upgrade — it's the answer."

JC Lightning supplies outdoor solar lighting to distributors, installers, and project contractors in markets where reliable grid power cannot be assumed. Three core ranges — solar security, garden and gate, decorative wall lanterns — engineered with cast aluminium housings, LiFePO4 batteries, and IP65 seals for sustained operation in high-heat, high-UV environments. CE certified. OEM and ODM available.

Solar Security Lighting

03

Solar Garden & Gate Lights

Why It Matters

Built for markets where ordinary
lighting gives up.

When the grid is unreliable, outdoor lighting has one job: work anyway. Every product in our range is designed around that constraint — materials, seals, batteries, and controls chosen for environments where failure is not acceptable.

Request a Specification Sheet
01

Independent of the Grid

Full overnight runtime on a single day's charge. LiFePO4 batteries operate stably from –20°C to +60°C. Your clients stay lit even when the neighbourhood goes dark.

02

IP65 as a Minimum Standard

Every security product carries IP65 or IP66 protection. Dust-proof. Rain-proof. Built for coastal humidity, tropical heat, and desert conditions.

03

OEM and ODM Programmes

Private-label packaging, custom finishes, retail-ready bulk programmes. Trial orders from 200 units. Standard lead time 30–45 days.

04

Certifications Ready to Ship

CE and RoHS test reports from accredited laboratories. Provided with every quotation — no waiting, no chasing.

How We Work

From enquiry to your dock.

Designed for international buyers who need clarity, not surprises. Every step documented.

01

Enquiry & Quotation

Send us product type, target quantity, and destination port. We respond with FOB price, full spec sheet, lead time, and certification documents.

Within 24 hours
02

Sample & Approval

1–3 units shipped via DHL or FedEx for physical evaluation. Sample fee fully refunded against your first order.

7–15 days
03

Production & QC

30% T/T deposit locks the order. Production at verified factories. Pre-shipment inspection report issued before final balance payment.

30–45 days
04

Shipment & Documents

FOB Shenzhen, Yantian, or Guangzhou. Full export documentation: B/L, Certificate of Origin, CE certificate, packing list, commercial invoice.

25–40 days transit
Common Questions

Answers before you ask.

Do your products work during power cuts?

Yes — that's the point. Every solar product charges independently during daylight and operates through the night without any connection to the grid. In markets like Colombia, Ecuador, and South Africa where outages are frequent or extended, this is the core selling argument to your end customers.

What is your typical MOQ?

From 200 units for trial orders on most products, scaling to 1,000+ for retail-pack programmes. We work with SOHO buyers, small distributors, and large importers alike.

What payment terms do you accept?

30% T/T deposit and 70% before shipment is standard. Letter of Credit (L/C at sight) accepted for orders above USD 30,000. Custom terms negotiable for repeat clients.

What is the standard lead time?

30–45 days for standard products. 45–60 days for OEM and custom packaging. Sea freight adds 25–40 days depending on destination port.

Do you provide samples?

Yes. Sample fees typically USD 50–150 per unit including international DHL or FedEx shipping. Sample cost is fully refunded against your first order.

Can you handle OEM and ODM?

Yes. Custom finishes, private-label packaging, brand printing, and PCB modification all available. MOQ for custom branding starts at 500–1,000 units.

What certifications come with your products?

CE and RoHS as standard, with documentation issued by accredited laboratories. FCC, SAA, IC, and other regional certifications available on request.

Which ports do you ship from?

Shenzhen (Yantian), Guangzhou (Nansha), and Shanghai are our standard FOB ports. CIF and DDP arrangements also available on request.
